replies.author: @Ur0nlyChild
replies.text:
68W Medic in Army [retired]
I strongly disagree with many of Hasans takes I've seen time to time, but I think ultimate free speech (excluding: yelling certain things to cause panic or saying something to incite violence or threaten one's life) should be allowed. If you want to say some of the worst things, you should be allowed to do so.

This does multiple things for free speech. Anyone can say anything. If words offend you, stop listening, if people say racist things in 100% seriousness, you can choose not to associate with them.

Free speech will help you filter who you want to be with.

Free speech is very important to me.

author: @MatthewsSloan
text:
Look. There are a bunch of first, second immigrants that I love, and have no problem calling them my American brother/sister. 
That being said. The 1965 immigration act was a giant civilization ending mistake that I just don't think we will recover from. 
There are too many people with too many interest. There has been very little assimilation. People advocating for their home country so they know they've got a life boat when this country sinks. People advocating for more of "their people" to come here. Members of the White House and Executive branch with dual citizenship. Members of Congress that weren't born here, are dual citizens of another country. 
It's going to collapse.
Femininity won't allow us to vote our way out of it. 
Just saying.

author: @Ur0nlyChild
text:
68W Medic in Army [retired]
I strongly disagree with many of Hasans takes I've seen time to time, but I think ultimate free speech (excluding: yelling certain things to cause panic or saying something to incite violence or threaten one's life) should be allowed. If you want to say some of the worst things, you should be allowed to do so.

This does multiple things for free speech. Anyone can say anything. If words offend you, stop listening, if people say racist things in 100% seriousness, you can choose not to associate with them.

Free speech will help you filter who you want to be with.

Free speech is very important to me.
